next_steps: Perform repetitive nerve stimulation and single-fiber electromyography (SFEMG)
Test for serum acetylcholine receptor (AChR) antibodies and MuSK antibodies
Evaluate for systemic amyloidosis with serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and free light chain assay
Perform pulmonary function tests (negative inspiratory force and forced vital capacity) to monitor respiratory status
Consider echocardiogram with strain imaging to evaluate for findings suggestive of cardiac amyloidosis
Obtain a neurology consultation for comprehensive bulbar and neuromuscular assessment
